attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
ORDER_HOLD_ID,                         
CREATION_DATE,                 
HOLD_NAME,                     
HEADER_ID,
LINE_ID,  
HOLD_ID,  
RELEASED_FLAG,                 
HOLD_APPLY_REASON , 
CREATED_BY,                    
LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
HOLD_RELEASE_REASON, 
HOLD_RELEASE_DATE,             
HOLD_RELEASED_BY,
HOLD_APPLY_COMMENT,            
HOLD_RELEASE_COMMENT,          
SS_CD,
GLOBAL_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM  $$NRTSTGDB.WI_OPL_ORD_HOLDS_DATA_ALL_NRT WIXOH
WHERE WIXOH.LINE_ID IS NULL
AND WIXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'OPL'
AND(
  NOT EXISTS 
  (
  SELECT 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSO
  WHERE (WIXOH.HEADER_ID=NSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT OR WIXOH.HEADER_ID = NSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT)
  AND (SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT>0 OR SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT>0)
  )
  OR NOT EXISTS
  (
  SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_HOLD SMSOH
  WHERE WIXOH.ORDER_HOLD_ID = SMSOH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT
  AND SS_CD='OPL'
  )
  )

SELECT
RANK() OVER
(ORDER BY
STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CODE) + SMHLD_ORD_MAX.MAX_ORD_HLD_SGK_VAL SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY,
STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM
(
SELECT DISTINCT
WIXOH.ORDER_HOLD_ID AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT ,
'OPL' AS SS_CODE
FROM
$$NRTSTGDB.WI_OPL_ORD_HOLDS_DATA_ALL_NRT WIXOH
WHERE WIXOH.LINE_ID IS NULL
) STHLD_ORD_BK ,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY),0) MAX_ORD_HLD_SGK_VAL
FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_HOLD ) SMHLD_ORD_MAX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_HOLD SSOH
WHERE SSOH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT = STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT
AND SSOH.SS_CD =STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CODE )

SELECT
ID AS ORDER_HOLD_ID,                         
CREATION_DATE,                 
HOLD_NAME,                     
HEADER_ID,
LINE_ID,  
HOLD_ID,  
RELEASED_FLAG,                 
HOLD_APPLY_REASON , 
CREATED_BY,                    
LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
HOLD_RELEASE_REASON, 
HOLD_RELEASE_DATE,             
HOLD_RELEASED_BY,
HOLD_APPLY_COMMENT,            
HOLD_RELEASE_COMMENT,          
'OPL' AS SS_CD,
'OPL' AS GLOBAL_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS UPDATE_DATETIME,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM  $$NRTSTGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HOLDS_DATA_NRT STHDR
WHERE STHDR.LINE_ID IS NULL

SELECT 
ORDER_HOLD_ID,                         
CREATION_DATE,                 
HOLD_NAME,                     
HEADER_ID,
LINE_ID,  
HOLD_ID,  
RELEASED_FLAG,                 
HOLD_APPLY_REASON , 
CREATED_BY,                    
LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
HOLD_RELEASE_REASON, 
HOLD_RELEASE_DATE,             
HOLD_RELEASED_BY,
HOLD_APPLY_COMMENT,            
HOLD_RELEASE_COMMENT,          
SS_CD,
GLOBAL_NAME,
CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS UPDATE_DATETIME,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_XXOPL_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL_NRT EUOOHA
WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
AND LINE_ID IS NULL
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_OPL_ORD_HOLDS_DATA_ALL_NRT WIXOH
				WHERE WIXOH.ORDER_HOLD_ID = EUOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID
AND WIXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = EUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
)

SELECT  
SSOH.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY,
CAST(WIXOH.CREATION_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0))  AS BK_SO_HOLD_DTM,
COALESCE(WIXOH.HOLD_NAME ,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS BK_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
-999 AS CREATED_BY_ID_INT,
WIXOH.ORDER_HOLD_ID AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
WIXOH.SS_CD AS SS_CD,
-999 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_INT,
COALESCE(WIXOH.RELEASED_FLAG,'=')  AS SO_RELEASED_ROLE,
WIXOH.HOLD_APPLY_REASON AS SO_HOLD_REASON_TXT,
COALESCE(WIXOH.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN')  AS  SO_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME, 
COALESCE(WIXOH.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN')  AS SO_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME, 
WIXOH.HOLD_RELEASED_BY AS RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
WIXOH.HOLD_RELEASE_REASON  AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
WIXOH.HOLD_RELEASE_DATE AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,	  
CASE WHEN COALESCE(WIXOH.RELEASED_FLAG,'=') ='Y' THEN COALESCE(WIXOH.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN')
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RU_SO_HLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USR_NAME,
WIXOH.HOLD_RELEASE_DATE AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DTM  ,
CAST(WIXOH.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)  AS DV_SO_HOLD_DT,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
WIXOH.CREATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
WIXOH.HOLD_RELEASE_DATE AS  SO_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
COALESCE(WIXOH.HOLD_RELEASE_COMMENT,'UNKNOWN')  AS RELEASE_COMMENT,
COALESCE(WIXOH.HOLD_APPLY_COMMENT,'UNKNOWN')    AS  HOLD_COMMENT
FROM  $$NRTSTGDB.WI_OPL_ORD_HOLDS_DATA_ALL_NRT WIXOH 
INNER JOIN 
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSO 
ON ( WIXOH.HEADER_ID=NSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT OR WIXOH.HEADER_ID = NSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_HOLD SSOH
ON ( WIXOH.ORDER_HOLD_ID = SSOH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT  )
WHERE WIXOH.LINE_ID IS NULL AND WIXOH.GLOBAL_NAME ='OPL'
AND (SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT>0 OR SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT>0) AND SSOH.SS_CD='OPL'
